Workflows.description: A list of workflow summaries for all workflows in your account.

NextToken.description: The pagination token you need to use to retrieve the next set of results. This value is null if there are no more results.

WorkflowArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the workflow.

CreatedAt.description: The timestamp when the workflow was created, in ISO 8601 date-time format.

ModifiedAt.description: The timestamp when the workflow was last modified, in ISO 8601 date-time format.

TriggerMode.description: The trigger mode for the workflow execution.

WorkflowArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the newly created workflow. This ARN uniquely identifies the workflow resource.

CreatedAt.description: The timestamp when the workflow was created, in ISO 8601 date-time format.

RevisionId.description: A unique identifier for this revision of the workflow configuration. This ID changes when the workflow is updated and you can use it for optimistic concurrency control in update operations. The revision ID helps prevent conflicting updates and ensures that updates are applied to the expected version of the workflow configuration.

WorkflowStatus.description: The current status of the workflow. Possible values are READY (workflow is ready to run) and DELETING (workflow is being deleted).

WorkflowVersion.description: The version identifier of the workflow. This is a service-generated alphanumeric string that uniquely identifies this version of the workflow. Amazon Managed Workflows for Apache Airflow Serverless uses a version-first approach where each workflow can have multiple immutable versions, which allows you to maintain different configurations and roll back to previous versions as needed. The version identifier is used in ARNs and API operations to reference specific workflow versions.

IsLatestVersion.description: A Boolean flag that indicates whether this workflow version is the latest version of the workflow.

WorkflowArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the deleted workflow.

WorkflowVersion.description: The version of the workflow that was deleted.

WorkflowArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the workflow that contains this task instance.

RunId.description: The unique identifier of the workflow run that contains this task instance.

TaskInstanceId.description: The unique identifier of this task instance.

WorkflowVersion.description: The version of the workflow that contains this task instance.

Status.description: The current status of the task instance.

DurationInSeconds.description: The duration of the task instance execution in seconds. This value is null if the task is not complete.

OperatorName.description: The name of the Apache Airflow operator used for this task instance.

ModifiedAt.description: The timestamp when the task instance was last modified, in ISO 8601 date-time format.

EndedAt.description: The timestamp when the task instance completed execution, in ISO 8601 date-time format. This value is null if the task is not complete.

StartedAt.description: The timestamp when the task instance started execution, in ISO 8601 date-time format. This value is null if the task has not started.

AttemptNumber.description: The attempt number for this task instance.

ErrorMessage.description: The error message if the task instance failed. This value is null if the task completed successfully.

TaskId.description: The unique identifier of the task definition within the workflow.

LogStream.description: The CloudWatch log stream name for this task instance execution.

Xcom.description: Cross-communication data exchanged between tasks in the workflow execution.

WorkflowArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the workflow.

CreatedAt.description: The timestamp when the workflow was created, in ISO 8601 date-time format.

ModifiedAt.description: The timestamp when the workflow was last modified, in ISO 8601 date-time format.

EngineVersion.description: The version of the Amazon Managed Workflows for Apache Airflow Serverless engine that this workflow uses.

DefinitionS3Location.description: The Amazon S3 location of the workflow definition file.

ScheduleConfiguration.description: The schedule configuration for the workflow, including cron expressions for automated execution. Amazon Managed Workflows for Apache Airflow Serverless uses EventBridge Scheduler for cost-effective, timezone-aware scheduling. When a workflow includes schedule information in its YAML definition, the service automatically configures the appropriate triggers for automated execution. Only one version of a workflow can have an active schedule at any given time.

RoleArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the IAM role used for workflow execution.

NetworkConfiguration.description: The network configuration for the workflow execution environment.

TriggerMode.description: The trigger mode for the workflow execution.

Type.description: The type of encryption to use. Values are AWS_MANAGED_KEY (Amazon Web Services manages the encryption key) or CUSTOMER_MANAGED_KEY (you provide a KMS key).

KmsKeyId.description: The ID or ARN of the Amazon Web Services KMS key to use for encryption. Required when Type is CUSTOMER_MANAGED_KEY.

WorkflowArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the workflow that contains this run.

WorkflowVersion.description: The version of the workflow that is used for this run.

RunId.description: The unique identifier of this workflow run.

RunType.description: The type of workflow run. Values are ON_DEMAND (manually triggered) or SCHEDULED (automatically triggered by schedule).

OverrideParameters.description: Parameters that were overridden for this specific workflow run.

RunDetail.description: Detailed information about the workflow run execution, including timing, status, and task instances.

WorkflowArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the workflow that contains this run.

WorkflowVersion.description: The version of the workflow used for this run.

RunId.description: The unique identifier of this workflow run.

StartedOn.description: The timestamp when the workflow run started execution, in ISO 8601 date-time format.

CreatedAt.description: The timestamp when the workflow run was created, in ISO 8601 date-time format.

CompletedOn.description: The timestamp when the workflow run completed execution, in ISO 8601 date-time format. This value is null if the run is not complete.

ModifiedAt.description: The timestamp when the workflow run was last modified, in ISO 8601 date-time format.

Duration.description: The total duration of the workflow run execution in seconds. This value is null if the run is not complete.

ErrorMessage.description: The error message if the workflow run failed. This value is null if the run completed successfully.

TaskInstances.description: A list of task instance IDs that are part of this workflow run.

RunState.description: The current execution state of the workflow run.

Tags.description: A map of tags that are associated with the resource, where each tag consists of a key-value pair.

TaskInstances.description: A list of task instance summaries for the specified workflow run.

NextToken.description: The pagination token you need to use to retrieve the next set of results. This value is null if there are no more results.

WorkflowArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the workflow that contains this task instance.

WorkflowVersion.description: The version of the workflow that contains this task instance.

RunId.description: The unique identifier of the workflow run that contains this task instance.

TaskInstanceId.description: The unique identifier of this task instance.

Status.description: The current status of the task instance.

DurationInSeconds.description: The duration of the task instance execution in seconds. This value is null if the task is not complete.

OperatorName.description: The name of the Apache Airflow operator used for this task instance.

WorkflowRuns.description: A list of workflow run summaries for the specified workflow.

NextToken.description: The pagination token you need to use to retrieve the next set of results. This value is null if there are no more results.

RunId.description: The unique identifier of the workflow run.

WorkflowArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the workflow that contains this run.

WorkflowVersion.description: The version of the workflow used for this run.

RunDetailSummary.description: Summary details about the workflow run execution.

Status.description: The current status of the workflow run.

CreatedOn.description: The timestamp when the workflow run was created, in ISO 8601 date-time format.

StartedAt.description: The timestamp when the workflow run started execution, in ISO 8601 date-time format.

EndedAt.description: The timestamp when the workflow run completed execution, in ISO 8601 date-time format. This value is null if the run is not complete.

WorkflowVersions.description: A list of workflow version summaries for the specified workflow.

NextToken.description: The pagination token you need to use to retrieve the next set of results. This value is null if there are no more results.

WorkflowVersion.description: The version identifier of the workflow version.

WorkflowArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the workflow that contains this version.

IsLatestVersion.description: Boolean flag that indicates whether this is the latest version of the workflow.

CreatedAt.description: The timestamp when the workflow version was created, in ISO 8601 date-time format.

ModifiedAt.description: The timestamp when the workflow version was last modified, in ISO 8601 date-time format.

DefinitionS3Location.description: The Amazon S3 location of the workflow definition file for this version.

Bucket.description: The name of the Amazon S3 bucket that contains the workflow definition file.

ObjectKey.description: The key (name) of the workflow definition file within the S3 bucket.

VersionId.description: Optional. The version ID of the workflow definition file in Amazon S3. If not specified, the latest version is used.

ScheduleConfiguration.description: The schedule configuration for this workflow version.

CronExpression.description: A cron expression that defines when the workflow is automatically executed. Uses standard cron syntax.

TriggerMode.description: The trigger mode for the workflow execution.

RunId.description: The unique identifier of the newly started workflow run.

Status.description: The initial status of the workflow run. This is typically STARTING when you first create the run.

StartedAt.description: The timestamp when the workflow run was started, in ISO 8601 date-time format.

WorkflowArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the workflow that contains the stopped run.

WorkflowVersion.description: The version of the workflow that was stopped.

RunId.description: The unique identifier of the stopped workflow run.

Status.description: The status of the workflow run after the stop operation. This is typically STOPPING or STOPPED.

WorkflowArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the updated workflow.

ModifiedAt.description: The timestamp when the workflow was last modified, in ISO 8601 date-time format.

WorkflowVersion.description: The version identifier of the updated workflow.
